question:
Will RCD Mallorca win on 2025-12-02?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for December 2, 2025
If RCD Mallorca wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.rfef.es/

evidences.title: Mallorca vs. Barcelona: Preview, Prediction and Lineups
evidences.content: # Mallorca vs. Barcelona: Preview, Prediction and Lineups Google Discover Barcelona haven’t lost away at Mallorca in La Liga in over 15 years. La Liga champions Barcelona make their 2025–26 season debut with a visit to Mallorca looking to set the tone of their title defense. Hansi Flick’s debut season with Barcelona couldn’t have gone much better. The Catalans dominated Spanish soccer in 2024–25. After a ferocious preseason, the expectation is to replicate that success. Mallorca entered 2024–25 on a mission to avoid relegation in Jagoba Arrasate’s first year on the touchline. They did that and then some, finishing 10th in La Liga and even threatening to finish in the European competition places for much of the season. evidences.title: Mallorca suffer major injury setback for Barcelona La Liga ...
evidences.content: ## Costa misses Barca game ahead of Premier League switch Mallorca’s preparations have been hit by issues focused on midfielder Samu Costa, who according to Diario AS, will miss the gam due to injury. A knee issue will keep him sidelined with Omar Mascarell also absent due to a suspension carried over from last season. Costa’s absence could also mean the end of his career in Mallorca, with his agent Jorge Mendes requesting talks with the club hierarchy over an exit. The Portugal international has attracted interest from the Premier League this month and he is pushing to move on before the window closes. Bournemouth are rumoured to be leading the chase as Costa looks to keep himself in contention for a place in Portugal’s FIFA 2026 World Cup qualification plans for September. [...] Barcelona Mallorca # Mallorca suffer major injury setback for Barcelona La Liga opener By Feargal Brennan - 2YC0E2H Palma de Mallorca, Spain. 20th Oct, 2024. Samu Costa (Mallorca) Football/Soccer : Spanish "La Liga EA Sports" match between RCD Mallorca 2-0 Rayo Vallecano at the Estadi Mallorca Son Moix in Palma de Mallorca, Spain . evidences.title: RCD Mallorca: Preview of Football Season 2025/26 - TOTN Mallorca
evidences.content: The next area to be dealt with was centre back. Captain Raillo and Valjent have performed one of the best defensive partnerships in La Liga for a number of years so their understudies were always going to have limited game time. At the start of last season Van der Heyden and Copete were the pretenders. Copete got more minutes playing time often being selected in a three man defence in away games. Belgian International Van der Heyden was the forgotten man and in January joined German side St. Pauli on loan helping to guide them to safety. This summer he joined Gent in his home country for two million euros. Copete was courted by Valencia and eventually signed for them for a reported four million euros. [...] Skip to content TOTN Mallorca Search TOTN Mallorca RCD Mallorca latest News # RCD Mallorca: Preview of Football Season 2025/26 #### We are still in the heat of summer but the La Liga football season starts on Saturday 16th August. And what a start it is for Real Mallorca who entertain current champions Barcelona at the Son Moix stadium with a 19.30 kick off! evidences.title: Football - Abandoned or Postponed Match Rules
evidences.content: If the match is confirmed to take place within the current or following 3 days of the original local event kick-off date, all bets on the match will stand, unless confirmation of the rescheduled start time is not received within 3 hours of the original kick-off, single bets will be void and multiple bets will be settled on the remaining selections. Please note that games which have their kick-off altered prior to the kick-off time will not be classed as postponed. Should the rescheduled time be outside of the following three days, undetermined bets will be void regardless of the announcement coming within 3 hours or not. [...] ### What happens to accumulators? If you've had an accumulator containing a postponed/abandoned match - including enhanced accumulators or the Soccer Saturday Price Boost - the bet will become the next bet down, i.e. a Treble becomes a Double etc. We cannot cancel or change bets containing postponed selections. However, In-Play Enhanced Accumulators, in instances where one selection doesn't take part (e.g. If a match is voided due to abandonment or postponement) are settled as void, as long as none of the other selections lose. If one of the other selectio...

I also love Modric, who always plays calmly and is ready to make a difference whether he’s a starter or coming off the bench. In short, it’s hard for me to choose, I’d say most of them.
